heading: Monitoring. Fire alarm systems shall be supervised by an Underwriters Laboratory listed supervising station or a Proprietary Supervising Station Alarm System meeting all of the requirements in NFPA 72, The National Fire Alarm and Signaling Code.
verbatim:
Exception: Monitoring by a supervising station is not required for:
(1)	Single and multiple-station smoke alarms required by Section 907.2.11.
(2)	Automatic sprinklers systems in one- and two-family dwellings.
(50)	Section 1103.5, Sprinkler systems, is repealed and reenacted to read:
